hero.subtitle: Create challenges, compete with others, prove your wins, and earn Bitcoin rewards — all on the open Nostr network.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Description: Set the rules, duration, and fund it with sats. Your challenge is published to Nostr for anyone to discover.
howItWorks.step2Description: Join challenges, submit photo proof, and track your progress. The community verifies completions.
howItWorks.step3Description: Complete challenges to earn NIP-58 badges and Lightning rewards. Your wins are visible across Nostr.

about.title: Part of the BitByBit Ecosystem
about.description: BitByBit started as a habit tracker that rewards kids with real sats for completing tasks. Now we're taking the same idea — real rewards for real effort — to the open Nostr network.

support.title: Support BitByBit
support.subtitle: Open source and community-driven. Help us keep building.
support.contributeDescription: Collaborate on GitHub with code or ideas

footer.motto: Bit by bit, building the future

nostrLogin.title: Sign in with Nostr
nostrLogin.description: Use your Nostr extension (Alby, nos2x, etc.) to sign in.
nostrLogin.installExtension: Install an extension like Alby or nos2x to continue.
